overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit downtown district at night. The character navigates crowded sidewalks, crosses intersections, and waits for traffic while surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in digital billboards and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy downtown street with neon storefronts and digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking through crowded downtown street following a group of pedestrians toward a large intersection

entered.detail: massive illuminated billboard displaying a woman's face with 'HOLO FIZZ' text
building covered in cyan and pink neon strip lighting
commercial building with purple neon signage
rain-soaked road surface reflecting neon lights

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a crowded downtown street at night in heavy rain, surrounded by other pedestrians. Neon-lit buildings line both sides of the street while a massive digital billboard looms ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with yellow striped crosswalk and digital billboard building

events.description: steps onto the yellow striped crosswalk to cross the main intersection
futuristic teal vehicle visible waiting at the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection toward the building with the large digital billboard, walking alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic teal sedan waiting at the traffic light at the far side of the intersection

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with thick yellow stripes
covered entrance to the building with the large billboard

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide rain-soaked intersection, walking over the yellow striped crosswalk toward the building with the massive digital billboard. A futuristic vehicle waits at the traffic light ahead while neon lights reflect off the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with neon storefronts and digital advertising pillars

events.description: passes under the building overhang entering a partially covered walkway section

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past illuminated storefronts and digital advertising displays

entered.detail: bright cyan neon strips lining a shop entrance
tall pillar with multiple digital advertisement screens

segments.scene_description: The character walks under the building overhang into a partially covered walkway, passing neon-lit storefronts and digital advertising pillars. The crowd thins out as they proceed along the concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching intersection with tall skyscrapers and heavy traffic

events.description: slows down and stops at the crosswalk waiting for the traffic signal to change

agents.ego_description: approaching the crosswalk and stopping to wait for vehicles to pass before crossing

notable_agents.action: futuristic teal sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: towering glass building with illuminated windows rising into the fog
pedestrian signal showing red hand indicating do not walk
tall vertical digital screen displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into an open area approaching a busy intersection. Tall glass skyscrapers loom in the background as the character stops at the crosswalk, waiting for a teal sports car and other traffic to pass.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection crosswalk with heavy traffic and towering neon-lit skyscrapers

events.description: multiple futuristic vehicles pass through the intersection including a black sedan
looks up toward the skyscrapers and neon signs above the street

agents.ego_description: standing at the crosswalk observing passing traffic and looking up at the surrounding skyscrapers and neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: black futuristic sedan driving through the wet intersection
teal sports car waiting at the traffic light on the right side

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with thick yellow stripes in the foreground
floating holographic signs above the street level

segments.scene_description: The character waits at the crosswalk as multiple futuristic vehicles pass through the intersection. The camera pans upward to reveal towering skyscrapers covered in neon lights and holographic advertisements against the rainy night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked downtown district that transitions from a crowded street into a towering urban canyon of neon lights. It begins with the character navigating a dense crowd of pedestrians under heavy rain, moving toward a massive digital billboard looming in the distance. As the character crosses a wide, reflective intersection over yellow stripes, the scene shifts toward a partially covered walkway where the crowd thins and neon-lit storefronts line a sidewalk of concrete and palm trees. The camera then emerges from the overhang into an open area, pausing at a busy crosswalk as a teal sports car and other futuristic vehicles stream past. Finally, the perspective pans upward from the street level to reveal a skyline of glass skyscrapers draped in holographic advertisements against the dark, rainy night sky.
